ques: Show me the list of one-way flights on June 17, 2026 from Chicago to Paris.
answer: Cannot show flights — June 17, 2026 is in the past (today is June 25, 2026). Google Flights disables all past dates (June 1–24 are greyed out; earliest selectable is June 25, 2026) and rejected the typed date, so no one-way Chicago→Paris flight list exists for that day. The one-way Chicago→Paris search was otherwise configured correctly.
